text.message: Black are you going for the 11/9/3?
Would you hate me if I went 6/3/4 and tried for 4/9/2
If you get there after the 11/9/3 then its all you anyway
i wont go there first i can make that promise
well there goes our deal i suppose
Otherwise I wouldn’t have asked you that
Just know I don’t have brick or wood
Black I am just going to that 3/1 port
Take the 4/9 for your wheat port
Don’t want to race and I think a 3:1 is smarter for my setup anyway
I just made it so others could still compete
u cut me off i almost dont have brick
Otherwise at least let me plow
Happens to the best of us
All I needed was 1 6 to plow
